trace_hooks.purpose: Template-level [SEQTRACE] markers for xformsjs-main/model-construct/rebuild/recalculate/revalidate/refresh and event dispatch.
sequenceTrace query option forwards sequence-template-trace stylesheet param.
Captures console [SEQTRACE] output and asserts ordered template subsequences.

acceptance_criteria: Model construction [SEQTRACE] output contains an ordered chain matching the diagram (xformsjs-main -> xforms-model-construct -> xforms-rebuild -> xforms-recalculate -> xforms-model-construct -> xforms-model-construct-done -> xforms-ready).
Interaction [SEQTRACE] output contains recalculate -> revalidate -> refresh template ordering.
Trace evidence is reproducible via tests/w3c/sequence-trace.spec.ts.

trace_hooks.purpose: DOMActivate/applyActions/action-* templates emit [SEQTRACE] markers for dispatch sequencing.
sequenceTrace query option enables template trace instrumentation at runtime.
Asserts ordered template chains for setvalue and dispatch flows.

acceptance_criteria: Setvalue flow [SEQTRACE] output matches DOMActivate -> applyActions(setvalue) -> action-setvalue -> outermost-action-handler -> recalculate/revalidate/refresh.
Dispatch flow [SEQTRACE] output shows action-dispatch before the target xforms-event-handler invocation.
Trace evidence is reproducible via tests/w3c/sequence-trace.spec.ts.

trace_hooks.purpose: [SEQTRACE] markers for action-send, xforms-submit, HTTPsubmit, and dispatch-submit-error.
sequenceTrace query option enables runtime template traces for submission scenarios.
Validates ordered success and failure submission template chains.

acceptance_criteria: Submission success path [SEQTRACE] output matches DOMActivate -> applyActions(send) -> action-send -> xforms-submit -> HTTPsubmit -> xforms-submit-done.
Submission error path [SEQTRACE] output matches DOMActivate -> applyActions(send) -> action-send -> xforms-submit -> HTTPsubmit -> dispatch-submit-error -> xforms-submit-error.
Trace evidence is reproducible via tests/w3c/sequence-trace.spec.ts.
